variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Heinrich Graf von Tecklenburg was born in 1060, in Tecklenburg, Westphalia, Prussia, Germany. He had at least 1 son with Gisèle de Lorraine. He died in 1118, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

ko.Tecklenburg, Westfalen, Preußen, Duitsla: 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 테클렌버그
ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich Graf von Tecklenburg(은)는 1060년 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 테클렌버그에서 태어났다. 그는 Gisèle de Lorraine(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1118년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.
